title: HelloHQ Sidecar RPC Envelope
description: Tier 1 (Python sidecar) RPC messages over newline-delimited JSON. RPC messages carry an "id"; lifecycle messages (lifecycle.schema.json) carry a "type".

oneOf.title: request
oneOf.description: Host -> sidecar. Invoke a plugin function.

args.description: Positional or named arguments; plugin-defined shape.

oneOf.title: success-response
oneOf.description: Sidecar -> host. Carries the same id as the request.

oneOf.title: error-response
oneOf.description: Sidecar -> host. Carries the same id as the request.

message.description: Short diagnostic. Never a raw stack trace.
